alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window narrows to 1-2 weeks amid escalation
alerts.summary: Global metrics confirm Iran's uranium enrichment at 60% U-235 with breakout timeline estimated at 1-2 weeks. IAEA board passed resolution demanding Iran report uranium stocks and grant inspector access (Reuters, BBC). Coincides with active Israel-Iran missile exchanges and US threat level at 9/10 (critical-imminent escalation).

alerts.title: Iran and Israel trade direct missile strikes; ceasefire fractures after June 13 exchanges
alerts.summary: Incidents feed reports Iran launched missiles at Israel in first bombardment since April ceasefire; Israel responded with air strikes on Lebanon. Multiple sources (NPR, PBS, BBC, AP News, WSJ) confirm exchange of fire. Trump stated he called off further Iran strikes citing negotiation progress, but active kinetic exchanges contradict de-escalation claims (incidents, 25 reports analyzed).

alerts.title: Houthis announce ban on Israeli vessels, escalate Red Sea naval threats
alerts.summary: Long War Journal and Reuters report Iran-backed Houthis announced complete ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea and threatened new attacks on Israel and regional shipping. Represents proxy escalation despite claimed US-Iran deal proximity (Long War Journal, Reuters). Coincides with elevated proxy status across Hezbollah, Iraqi Shiite Militias, and PIJ.

alerts.title: Iran-linked group claims hack of FBI drones; threatens World Cup sabotage
alerts.summary: Multiple sources (Middle East Eye, France 24, CBS News) report Iran-linked cyber group claimed successful hack of FBI drone systems and threatened disruption of 2026 World Cup. Represents escalation of cyber dimension alongside kinetic conflict and potential civilians-facing threats. Part of broader cyber campaign including California water system attack claims.

alerts.title: US public anxiety peaks amid Iran deal uncertainty and Trump messaging contradictions
alerts.summary: US sentiment analysis shows 48% negative (up from ~45% baseline), with 'trump' (83 mentions), 'iran' (14 mentions), and 'deal' (14 mentions) dominating word cloud. Reflects public concern over conflicting signals: Trump claims progress in talks while active missile exchanges and nuclear breakout timeline shorten (sentiment, June 13).

analysis_note: The fragile April ceasefire between Israel and Iran has collapsed into direct kinetic exchange on June 13, while Iran's nuclear enrichment accelerates toward breakout (1-2 weeks), regional proxies escalate, and cyber threats emerge—creating a multi-domain crisis amid contradictory US diplomatic and military signaling.
